title: Differentiator
description: A comparative claim positioning the product against an alternative. Differentiators are always relative — the `comparison_basis` names the reference being compared against.

claim.description: The comparative claim (e.g., '40% lighter than the previous model').

comparison_basis.description: What the claim is measured against. Open vocabulary. Well-known values: `category_average`, `named_competitor`, `previous_generation`, `industry_standard`. Implementations MAY use additional values.
